Description


Support the body’s innate repair system with **STEMREGEN® Release**, a clinically tested blend of natural ingredients that support stem cell release and migration. This scientific breakthrough formula supports organ and tissue function, fostering healthy aging and rejuvenation from within.

## Discover the reason Release is rated as **the best stem cell supplement**.


Featured Review


### Richie S.

Verified Buyer

## No more aches

“After about a month and a half, I didn’t have any discomfort anymore.”


Frequently Asked Questions


**Who is STEMREGEN® Release for?**

Release is designed for anyone over 30 looking to support their body's innate repair system by increasing the number of circulating stem cells for optimal health and longevity.

**How does STEMREGEN® Release support stem cell function in the body?**

Release uses a clinically tested blend of plant extracts and bioactives, including SeaStem and StemAloe, that trigger stem cell release from the bone marrow and support their migration into tissues throughout the body.

**When should I take a stem cell supplement like Release?**

The time of day that you take a stem cell supplement may vary based on the active ingredients, however, Release can be taken at any time of day with or without food.

**What makes STEMREGEN® Release different from other stem cell supplements?** Release combines multiple clinically tested plant extracts that support both stem cell release and migration, addressing two critical aspects of stem cell function in a single formula backed by over 20 years of dedicated stem cell research from founder Christian Drapeau, MSc.


Shipping


We will work quickly to ship your order as soon as possible. Once your order has shipped, you will receive an email with further information. Delivery times vary depending on your location.

![Close-up of a metallic object with reflective surfaces](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/release-feature-1-stemrelease.webp?v=1771517980&width=3840)

![Enhance Repair Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/Enhanced_Repair_e2613cda-4fa8-42ea-b13e-957e6f45d14a.svg?v=1770447140&width=3840)

## Stem Cell Release

**STEMREGEN® Release** is specifically formulated to increase circulating stem cells by supporting their natural release from the bone marrow.

Higher levels of stem cells in the bloodstream help promote optimal repair, resilience, and long-term vitality.

![Close-up of a textured black surface with white oval patterns](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/release-feature-2-migration.webp?v=1771517980&width=3840)

![Mobilization Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/Mobilization_66ac6ba7-375e-49b1-8530-364f6cd4d051.svg?v=1770447028&width=3840)

## Stem Cell Migration

This proprietary bioactive blend not only increases stem cell availability, but also supports their natural migration into tissues.

By helping stem cells reach where they’re needed most, **STEMREGEN® Release** plays a key role in maintaining tissue health and whole-body vitality.

![Close-up of a tree trunk cross-section showing annual growth rings.](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/release-feature-3-healthyaging.webp?v=1771517980&width=3840)

![Healthy Aging Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/Healthy_Aging.svg?v=1770447028&width=3840)

## Supports Healthy Aging

Stem cells are central to the body’s innate repair system, supporting the maintenance of organs and tissues over time.

By enhancing stem cell release and function, **STEMREGEN® Release** helps slow visible signs of aging and supports sustained health and vitality.

![SeaStem™](https://www.stemregen.co/products/release?selling_plan=10676666646)

### SeaStem™

Increases the number of circulating stem cells by 35%

Harvested from the Tibetan Plateau, our SeaStem is a uniquely sourced extract of sea buckthorn berry, which contains a wealth of polyphenols and anthocyanidins that have been documented to support the release of stem cells from the bone marrow. The scientific name for sea buckthorn, Hippophae, is derived from the Greek words "hippo" (horse), and "phae" (light) and essentially means "shining horse". It comes from Alexander the Great after he witnessed the regenerative benefits of sea buckthorn on a herd of horses wounded in battle.

Close

![StemAloe®](https://www.stemregen.co/products/release?selling_plan=10676666646)

### StemAloe®

Increases the number of circulating stem cells by 80%.

Extracted from a unique species of aloe coming from Madagascar, StemAloe is indigenously known as 'vahona' and has been used for centuries for a wide variety of health benefits. It has been documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells by an average of 80%.

Close

![StemAFA™](https://www.stemregen.co/products/release?selling_plan=10676666646)

### StemAFA™

Increases the number of circulating stem cells by 25%

AFA is a blue-green algae growing naturally in Klamath Lake, Southern Oregon.  AFA extract has been documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells by 25%.  AFA is also been known for its effect on the immune system and for supporting mental energy and clarity.

Close

![Fucus Vesiculosus Extract](https://www.stemregen.co/products/release?selling_plan=10676666646)

### Fucus Vesiculosus Extract

Documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells.

Fucus Vesiculosus Extract is a seaweed that has been used for centuries for its numerous health benefits, especially on the immune system. In addition to its effect on stem cells, the polyphenols (phlorotannins) and fucoidan in fucus have been associated with a broad variety of health benefits.

Close

![Panax Notoginseng Extract](https://www.stemregen.co/products/release?selling_plan=10676666646)

### Panax Notoginseng Extract

Documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells and to provide a broad variety of health benefits.

Panax Notoginseng Extract has been associated with benefits to the cardiovascular and endocrine systems, and has been documented to significantly increase the number of circulating stem cells.

Close

![Beta-Glucan 1-3](https://www.stemregen.co/products/release?selling_plan=10676666646)

### Beta-Glucan 1-3

Documented to support various aspects of stem cell function.

Beta-Glucan has been documented to support various aspects of stem cell function, including stem cell proliferation, release from the bone marrow, and migration into tissues. The Beta-Glucan used in Stemregen Release is is 85% (1→3)-b-D-glucose bonds, the most potent form of Beta-Glucan.

Close

![Highly Fractionated Colostrum](https://www.stemregen.co/products/release?selling_plan=10676666646)

### Highly Fractionated Colostrum

Contains growth factors documented to support stem cell function.

The bioactives in this highly fractionated colostrum, such as growth factors and cytokines, support stem cell function in the body. Colostrum has also been associated with a wide range of health benefits.

Close

THE PROTOCOL

As Part of “The STEMREGEN® Protocol”

**STEMREGEN® Release,** in combination with STEMREGEN® Signal and Mobilize, form a comprehensive approach to tapping into the potential of stem cells. While SIGNAL fine-tunes the body’s cellular communication, ensuring stem cells circulate throughout the body, and MOBILIZE helps stem cells to seamlessly travel through blood vessels, resulting in efficient stem cell delivery, RELEASE supports stem cell release and migration.

Each component of the system plays a distinct role, yet together this triad supports the body’s innate repair system, paving the way for healthy aging with optimal health and longevity.

[Learn More](https://www.stemregen.co/pages/protocols)

**DISCLAIMER:** At STEMREGEN®, our mission is to educate on the potential of stem cells and their role as the body’s innate repair system. The information provided on this website—including articles, educational content, copy, video testimonials, and other materials—is intended solely for informational and educational purposes. Our claim is simple: STEMREGEN® supports the body’s natural repair system by increasing the number of circulating stem cells. We invite you to consider, “If you have more stem cells in circulation, what could happen?”

Our products are backed by scientific research, and we substantiate the increase in circulating stem cells through documented clinical trials and ongoing studies. We reference peer-reviewed articles and research to demonstrate the broader effects of stem cells in the body, highlighting outcomes that are grounded in science. Any research we present is based on clinical trials conducted by our company and/or independent laboratories, ensuring the credibility and validity of the results.

Please note that none of the content shared here is intended to make medical claims, diagnose, treat, or provide medical advice for any conditions. The personal stories and experiences shared are unique to the individuals and should not be interpreted as guarantees of specific outcomes. Always consult with a healthcare professional before beginning any new supplement or treatment. The statements on this site have not been evaluated by the FDA, and our products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
